securityFor: For Data Protection Officers and Information Security teams · stackme-app.vercel.app · MIT License

securityData.label: Data processing location
securityData.value: All analysis runs inside the user's browser via DuckDB-Wasm (WebAssembly SQL engine). No backend API for data.

securityData.label: File upload to server
securityData.value: Files are read by the browser File API and passed directly to the WASM engine in memory. No file is transmitted.

securityData.label: Column names / schema
securityData.value: Schema is inferred locally inside DuckDB-Wasm.

securityData.label: Query results / row data
securityData.value: Results stay in browser memory until the tab is closed.

securityData.label: Data retention
securityData.value: No data is persisted. Closing the tab wipes everything.

securityData.label: Backend API for data
securityData.value: The api/client.ts module exists for account features only (unrelated to data tools).

securityNetwork.label: Vercel CDN (static assets)
securityNetwork.value: JS, CSS, WASM binaries served from Vercel Edge. Standard CDN delivery, no user data.

securityNetwork.label: Clerk (auth sessions)
securityNetwork.value: Clerk handles authentication for account features. Makes a session-validity request on page load. Does not receive any file data, column names, or query results.

securityNetwork.label: Analytics / tracking
securityNetwork.value: Vercel Analytics was removed. No page-view tracking, no cookies, no fingerprinting on data tool pages.

securityNetwork.label: Third-party scripts
securityNetwork.value: No Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, Hotjar, or similar SDKs.

securityNetwork.label: Requests after file upload
securityNetwork.value: Once a file is loaded, all processing is local. No outbound requests carry user data.

securityHosting.label: Static hosting
securityHosting.value: Vercel Edge Network (SOC 2 Type II certified). Serves only pre-built static files.

securityHosting.label: Data center region
securityHosting.value: Vercel Edge — closest point of presence. EU users served from EU edge nodes.

securityHosting.label: Server-side code
securityHosting.value: No server-side code for data tools. Pure static SPA.

securityGdpr.label: Personal data processed server-side
securityGdpr.value: File contents never reach a server.

securityGdpr.label: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
securityGdpr.value: Not required for core data tools — no personal data is processed by StackMe. May apply to Clerk (auth) if your organisation requires DPAs with all sub-processors.

securityGdpr.label: Cookies
securityGdpr.value: Clerk sets a session cookie for authenticated users only. No tracking cookies.

securityGdpr.label: Data subject rights (GDPR Art. 17)
securityGdpr.value: We hold no user data to delete.

securityGdpr.label: Sub-processors
securityGdpr.value: Vercel (hosting), Clerk (authentication). Neither receives file data.

securityVerifyIntro: Any reviewer can verify the zero-data-egress claim without trusting this document:
securityVerifySteps: Press F12 → DevTools → Network tab → clear the log
Drop any CSV or JSON file onto the upload zone
Observe: zero outbound requests containing file contents, column names, or data values
securityNote: This document reflects the architecture as of the commit date. The application is open source — the definitive source of truth is the code at github.com/stackme-io/StackMe. Key files: src/shared/analytics/index.ts (WASM engine + DuckDB init) · src/modules/analyze-me/useAnalyze.ts (analysis pipeline) · src/main.tsx (no analytics import).
